title: Fix SaaS billing API; Customer badge; welcome subscribe page
description:
Billing and Home failed with loadTenantByOwner is not a function due to a circular import between tenant-provisioning and saas-billing. Fixed by moving subscription constants to a shared module.

SAAS_SKIP_SUBSCRIPTION_CHECK was enabled on OVH, which treated every purchaser as subscribed and showed Workspace owner immediately — disabled for real Stripe gating.

Pre-subscribe purchasers now show Customer in the sidebar. Home restores the Buy Subscription button and product bullet showcase when billing API hiccups. Script cache versions bumped on cPanel pages.

Who is affected: pipeshare.net cPanel sign-ups (e.g. new tenant purchasers).
changeLog: Disable SAAS_SKIP_SUBSCRIPTION_CHECK on OVH so expired means expired.
Sidebar shows Customer until subscription activates on login.
Home welcome page: big Buy button + PipeShare/PipeSync bullet cards restored.
Bump cPanel script cache versions so nav and badges update after deploy.
